title: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
description: Each year Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory staff and Lawrence Livermore National Security, LLC donate more than $3 million to local nonprofits. Learn more about how we give back to our community.
text:
For more than 50 years, the annual Helping Others More Effectively (HOME) Campaign has been the Lab’s largest charitable giving effort. It kicks off in late October and runs through Giving Tuesday, giving employees a focused period to support organizations in our community. In 2025, LLNL employees, along with Lawrence Livermore National Security (LLNS), LLC, donated more than $3.76 million to charitable organizations via the Campaign.
Participating employees can select charitable organizations for their donations from the IRS Exempt Organization Business Master file. Charitable organizations do not need to register with the HOME Campaign to be eligible to receive donations.
